description: 八字历法边界 golden；只锁定真太阳时、早晚子时、时区转换、经纬度偏移和节气边界，不锁完整断语。

source.generatedBy: FateCat pure-analysis accepted regression on 2026-06-15
source.riskBoundary: 这些样本只作为测试 oracle，不替代生产期 CalendarProvider 计算。

tolerance.note: runtime_full cases lock current accepted regression output exactly.

source.oracle: FateCat accepted regression: lunar-python 1.4.8 EightChar/Yun plus paipan-master true solar time adapter
source.generatedBy: FateCat TP-02.02 boundary fixture hardening on 2026-06-16
source.license: MIT dependency output plus project-owned fixture
source.privacy: synthetic edge-case payload; no real person data

failureExplanation.trueSolarTime: 锁定当前真太阳时管线；失败说明经度、均时差、时区归一化或 paipan adapter 行为发生变化。
failureExplanation.fourPillars: 锁定 lunar-python 四柱结果；失败说明节气、日柱、时柱或子时边界语义发生变化。
failureExplanation.fortuneStart: 锁定 lunar-python 起运结果；失败说明顺逆起运、节气锚点或真太阳时输入发生变化。

tolerance.note: runtime_full cases lock current accepted regression output exactly.
